label: Early morning waking
query: She keeps waking up at 5:00 AM bright and ready to start the day. Bedtime is 7:00 PM. How do I shift her to a 6:30 AM wake up?

label: Daycare bedtime clash
query: He takes a massive 3-hour nap at daycare from 12pm to 3pm, but then at home he refuses to go to sleep until 9:30 PM. I get no evening.

label: Daycare drop-off schedule constraint
query: I literally can't do the morning nap anymore because of daycare dropoffs. Ignore whatever plan we had. Please push his first nap to exactly 11:30 AM every day going forward.

label: Toddler nap transition edge case
query: Do toddlers need a morning nap at 13 months, or should they all be on one nap by this age?

label: Reverse cycling for a breastfed baby
query: My 5-month-old barely feeds during the day but then breastfeeds all night and is still gaining weight well. Is this reverse cycling and what should I do?

label: Temporary sleep disruption after vaccination
query: My baby had vaccines yesterday and sleep is a mess tonight. Should I try sleep training now or just focus on comfort for a couple of days?
